column3: As a reader, I want pages and search to load quickly so browsing feels smooth.
column4: Given normal operating load (≤ 10 concurrent users, ≤ 10 requests/sec), When a user loads an article or performs a search, Then 95% of responses complete in ≤ 2s and no request exceeds 5s.

column3: As an admin, I want privileged actions protected so unauthorized users can’t modify or delete data.
column4: Given RBAC is enforced, When a non-admin attempts a privileged action (e.g., delete, role change), Then the action is denied and logged; only admins may proceed after MFA verification.
column5: 100% of privileged actions require MFA; 100% unauthorized attempts logged

column3: As a user, I want the platform to be reliably reachable so I can read news anytime.
column4: Given production deployment, When uptime is measured over any 30-day period, Then service availability is ≥ 99.5%, excluding scheduled maintenance.

column3: As a system architect, I want the platform to handle growth without major slowdowns.
column4: Given load testing up to 10 req/s and 10,000 active users, When traffic scales horizontally, Then median and p95 response times degrade by ≤ 10% vs. baseline.

column3: As a visually impaired user, I want readable pages and controls.
column4: Given accessibility testing, When the UI is evaluated, Then it meets WCAG 2.1 AA and supports font scaling up to 200% with contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1.
column5: WCAG 2.1 AA pass; font scale 200%; contrast ≥ 4.5:1
